perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman wearing a white button-down shirt and a grey plaid skirt is sitting on a black leather sofa in a bright indoor environment, likely a car showroom or mall. Three iPhone boxes are placed on a wooden table in front of her. (2) She picks up the blue iPhone box, shows its back to the camera, and begins unboxing it by peeling the paper security seals. (3) She opens the box to reveal a blue titanium iPhone 15 Pro, picks it up, and displays the camera module to the viewer. (4) She sets the blue phone down and points at the white and natural titanium versions to compare the three different color options.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An enthusiastic male voice introduces the woman as 'Potato Strip Sister' and the topic of unboxing iPhone 15 Pro colors over upbeat background music with a steady beat. (2) The woman starts speaking in a friendly, conversational tone about her color choice. The sound of paper seals being torn is audible as she unboxes the device. (3) A male voice reacts with high-pitched excitement, exclaiming 'Wo de tian na' (Oh my god), as the phone is revealed. (4) The conversation between the off-screen male and the on-screen female continues, focusing on the aesthetic match between her manicured nails and the phone's blue color.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '薯條姐開箱 iPhone 15 Pro 全系列顏色' (Potato Strip Sister unboxing iPhone 15 Pro all series colors) - informative hook. (2) Decorative Text: '今天開手機' (Opening phones today) - emphasis on action. (3) Functional Text: '哎唷藍色' (Oh, blue) - reaction subtitle. (4) Functional Text: '我是為了這個做了美甲' (I got my nails done for this) - explaining the color coordination. (5) Decorative Text: '哇我的天吶' (Wow, oh my god) - expressing excitement. (6) Functional Text: '白色' (White), '藍色' (Blue), '橘色' (Orange/Titanium) - labeling the phone colors.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Unboxing process -> Three-way color comparison

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator on screen; male presence is only vocal.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian woman with long brown hair, wearing a white business-casual shirt, a grey plaid skirt, and an ID badge around her neck.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor space with glass railings overlooking a lower floor, a poster with '尚德汽車' (Sunde Motors) on the wall, and black leather furniture.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide a lifestyle-oriented unboxing experience of the iPhone 15 Pro series. It focuses on the aesthetic appeal of different color options (Blue, White, and Natural Titanium) rather than technical specs, using the female host's personal style (nails) as a point of connection for the audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Displaying multiple brand-new high-end devices in a showroom environment with branded packaging clearly visible.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Introduction of the character 'Shu Tiao Jie' (Potato Strip Sister).
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The interaction between the off-screen male director/cameraman and the female host creates a variety-show atmosphere that makes the tech content more accessible to a general audience.
